arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -mfloat-abi=soft -ffreestanding -nostdlib -nodefaultlibs --specs=nosys.specs -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -O0 -g -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fno-common -fno-builtin -std=gnu11 -g -T/home/ckq/LCMHalMCPServer/testcases/zephyr_flash_official_contrib/src/linker.ld -nostdlib -nostartfiles -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/zephyr_flash_test.dir/startup_stm32f103c8tx.s.o CMakeFiles/zephyr_flash_test.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/zephyr_flash_test.dir/syscalls.c.o -o zephyr_flash_test  -lgcc
